ValidationRule.description: Discharge Date mandatory for Discharged Status
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR((ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Status__c ) && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Discharged')&& ISNULL( Insolvency_Discharged_Date__c )), (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Discharged')&& ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Discharged_Date__c )&& ISNULL(Insolvency_Discharged_Date__c )), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Discharge Date is mandatory as Insolvency Status moved to Discharged
